sentence: I have not overlooked any details in the report.
translation: No he pasado por alto ningún detalle en el informe.

sentence: She had not anticipated such strong opposition.
translation: Ella no había anticipado una oposición tan fuerte.

sentence: They will not compromise on the project’s standards.
translation: No comprometerán los estándares del proyecto.

sentence: He has not been entirely honest about the situation.
translation: Él no ha sido completamente honesto sobre la situación.

sentence: We had not considered all possible contingencies.
translation: No habíamos considerado todas las posibles contingencias.

sentence: I will not tolerate repeated negligence.
translation: No toleraré negligencia repetida.

sentence: She has not been forthcoming with the facts.
translation: Ella no ha sido franca con los hechos.

sentence: They had not prepared adequately for the negotiations.
translation: No se habían preparado adecuadamente para las negociaciones.

sentence: He will not accept partial solutions.
translation: Él no aceptará soluciones parciales.

sentence: We have not yet resolved the underlying issue.
translation: Todavía no hemos resuelto el problema subyacente.

sentence: I had not anticipated the full scope of the problem.
translation: No había anticipado el alcance completo del problema.

sentence: She will not entertain frivolous arguments.
translation: Ella no considerará argumentos frívolos.

sentence: They have not acted in accordance with company policy.
translation: No han actuado de acuerdo con la política de la empresa.

sentence: He had not consulted all stakeholders before making the decision.
translation: No había consultado a todas las partes interesadas antes de tomar la decisión.

sentence: I will not underestimate the complexity of this task.
translation: No subestimaré la complejidad de esta tarea.

sentence: She has not been briefed on the latest developments.
translation: Ella no ha sido informada sobre los últimos avances.

sentence: We had not foreseen the consequences of the change.
translation: No habíamos previsto las consecuencias del cambio.

sentence: They will not condone unethical behavior.
translation: No tolerarán un comportamiento poco ético.

sentence: He has not provided sufficient evidence for his claims.
translation: Él no ha proporcionado suficiente evidencia para sus afirmaciones.

sentence: I have not neglected any aspect of the assignment.
translation: No he descuidado ningún aspecto de la tarea.
